_comment: Drop-in Claude Code settings for enabling BlastGuard routing hooks. Copy the relevant block into your project's .claude/settings.json (or user-scope ~/.claude/settings.json). All three hooks are safe to enable — they only emit additionalContext nudges and never deny the user's chosen tool.
_requirements: jq must be on PATH. The hook scripts must be executable (chmod +x).
_hook_script_path_note: Replace /ABSOLUTE/PATH/TO/blastguard below with the absolute path to the BlastGuard repo clone on your machine (or wherever you copied integrations/claude-code/hooks/ to).
